Splurt  

Description

11: Increase Hitpoints by 1 per tick.

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 237 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Resist Adjust: -100 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your body begins to splurt.
Cast on other: Soandso 's body begins to splurt.
Effect Fades: Your body stops splurting.

Game Description

Causes your target's body to splurt, doing progressively more damage the longer it lasts.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Splurt
  • Zevfeer's Shroud of Despair

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Splurt
ClassLevel
NEC51
Expansion:

Duration:
1.6 mins
  • Comments (24)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (45)
  • Crafted (1)
  • NPCs with Ability (2)

Trakanon's Teeth

  • Spell: Splurt - Research 130
Post Comment
Add Dragoon V'Resh in Overthere as a mob that can drop this.
QuoteReply
# May 27 2010 at 10:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591978586548
6 posts
Killing cliff golems in Overthere had the goons add as usual this guy dropped last...looted and was surprised to see this spell...if you can handle 3-5 goons, General D'Veer and a cliff golem...I would hunt here for this spell...no idea what the drop rate is must be kinda rare as I've never seen it drop off a goon before and I've killed literally hundreds of these guys along with cliff golems.
▲ Page top
Does it still drop?
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2008 at 7:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592340228874
4 posts
I am having trouble getting this spell to drop.
I have gone to the City of Mist and killed golems there for about 3-4 hours.
I have also gone to Skyfire Mountains and killed mobs named above for about 5-6 hours.
Today I went to the Burning Woods and killed mobs stated above for about 3 hours.
Not one drop of Splurt (or Sacrifice).
I've been away from EQ for quite some time so I am wondering if these spells still drop since the new Research was implemented.
Any info would be appreciated.
Thanks ahead of time.
▲ Page top
Does it still drop?
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2008 at 5:15 AM Rating: Decent
drool
1,563 posts
Still drops in Skyfire also, just got it yesterday.

Have the best luck with wurms and wyverns, chromadracs seem a decent source too, but I try to avoid these when I can, hate their dispel.
▲ Page top
Does it still drop?
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2008 at 10:43 AM Rating: Default
SSJGhol
View User Forum
255 posts
Still drops got this spell and convergence in Sebilis a few days ago try there almost any mob in the zone can drop spells. Two or three hours there should net you a couple spells just keep going until you get the one you need. Sacrifice is also not a dropped spell but the result of the spell turn-in quest out of OT or Cabilis.

Edited, Mar 30th 2008 2:49pm by SSJGhol

Does it still drop?

Thanks for the info.
▲ Page top
Still using at 66
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2005 at 12:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591847149776
15 posts
1. Not resisted very often.
2. Damage near 70 per tick average is no slouch.
3. I can cast this on ANY raid at the first contact of the Main tank and still not have to worry about agro since it builds up slowly.
4. Low mana so can cast it when I am running tight to help in a fight but not able to burn mobs more.
5. Good Range.
6. Awesome for pulls. Pet can take on agro within his first hit and he will typically not get behind this as it goes.
▲ Page top
Uber Solo Spell
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2004 at 11:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
This spell is a godsend. I took it with me to Ruins of Old Guk (Lower Guk) to the Frenzied Ghoul spawn, and soloed my way to 51 to use ot. Pre 51, I was having trouble doing sizeable damage without having to FD every mob off of me and onto my pet. My line up looked something like this:

1. Darkness for the pull
2. Shackle of Spirit while siccing pet during cast
3. FD or Root to lose aggro, depending on which mob (Root for single pulls, FD for more than one)
4. Pop from FD and Bond of Death to regen
5. Step in to tank the rest of the way (If there is a single pull I'll tank the mob once it's slowed to keep DEF maxed, if multis, this is where I step back and slow the rest of the mobs)

This method took me from 3% of level 50 to level 51 with 5% AA so far, in about a 6 hour session. However, once I got my hands on Splurt, I noticed I could dot the mobs more effectively, without having to worry about shaking aggro. Here's my new method, WITH Splurt:

1. Pull with Splurt, run back to camp spot.
2. Sic pet while casting slow.
3. Splurt any adds, assist pet and Bond of Death his target.

This method has sped up my leveling quite a bit. The undead frogloks have an average run speed, so if I can manage to get max casting range, I beat them back to the camp spot easily.
▲ Page top
Usefulness
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2004 at 1:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570998378
9 posts
I still use this spell! Presently, I solo (aggro kite) in Tactics, this is the 3rd spell I cast. Embrassing Darkness, BoT, Splurt! I completely agree with Agrio as to the usefulness of this spell. Get it! Keep it! and Use it!
▲ Page top
Insane DPM with Focus & Spec!!!
QuoteReply
# May 12 2004 at 8:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767080873
View User Forum
64 posts
The "unmodified" DPM (Damage Per Mana) of Splurt is 6.8186 (Costs 237 Mana and does 1616 damage).

However, if you have Alteration as your primary specialization (and you should!) you save 10% on every Alteration spell (at 200 Spec). Affliction Efficiency saves another 25%. This reduces the cost of Splurt to a mere 160 mana. (237 x .9 x. 75 = 159.975). And if you have a Burning Affliction item the damage is raised to 1939 (1616 x 1.2).

With these 3 modifiers the actual DPM is a GODLY 12.1188!!! Add in a super low resist rate and very low up front aggro and you have one of the best spells in the game.

This is not just a soloing spell. The 1.6 minute duration makes it good for most group situations as well. PoP Mobs have a lot of hit points and most groups will need well over a minute to finish a mob. Cast splurt as soon as the Mob is in range. The first 3 ticks only do 11, 23 and 35 damage respectively, so you won't generate much aggro early on.

A truly AWESOME SPELL....use at every opportunity!!!
▲ Page top
RE: Insane DPM with Focus & Spec!!!
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2004 at 4:59 PM Rating: Default
Methis
101 posts
I rarely use this in groups.

In Innovation the damage gets up to about 80 per tick
LDoN 35ish


However solo. you know it.
I am not the best soloer but this is my general stack
1: Dooming Darkness
2: Plague
3: Envenomed Bolt > sick pet
4: Splurt

also have Ignite Blood for extra damage at low cost
and Bond of Death at 60% health from Lich
▲ Page top
Cure?
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2003 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788695898
View User Forum
Scholar
99 posts
Anyone know the check on this? Is it disease, poison or magic based? In PvP the necroes like to hit people with this and as a cleric would be nice to know the check on this and if it is curable. Any info would be appreciated.
▲ Page top
RE: Cure?
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2003 at 10:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591795362173
293 posts
This is a Magic based spell. Please note your chance to resist this spell is -100 vs magic.

Not sure which server you play on but the hardened pvp veterans will try to stack good buffs with 1-3 open spaces at the top. The idea is when your body starts to SpLuRt you can use pumis or cancle magic spell to 'cure' yourself without clicking off all your protection.

I have yet to see this spell resisted by another PC. In the new age of uber resist gear I am thankful my old friend SpLuRt still rides shotgun :)
▲ Page top
RE: Cure?
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2003 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254254545
View User Forum
56 posts
Magic
▲ Page top
Splurts Actual Damage
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2003 at 11:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759929089
Sage
74 posts
This is the actual DMG of Splurt w/o Extended Affliction which on this date does not actually effect splurt. (Don't Worry I /bug 'd it)

11, 23, 35, 47, 59, 71, 83, 95, 107, 119, 131, 143, 155, 167, 179, 191, 203.

1819 Damage over 17 ticks.
▲ Page top
RE: Splurts Actual Damage
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2003 at 12:01 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1595175496031
101 posts
This spell does not go to 203 dmg. The last tick is 191 dmg on this spell. I also as a previous poster has stated, have never seen this spell resisted except on high end named mobs. Because it has such a low initial dmg and builds to it's max, it has an especially low agro when using it.

I used to use it allot, but after getting funeral pyre I rarely use it anymore. I would still load this spell however, if I just wanted to overstack some mob with umpteen dots as it stacks with any other dot line we have.
▲ Page top
RE: Splurts Actual Damage
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2004 at 9:43 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
Extended Affliction has been changed to Burning Affliction, whereby the damage is increased by 1-20% at random (average +10%). Here's a log from a couple of days ago with a BA3 item in use:
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:03 2004] You begin casting Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:06 2004] Foul Pusling's body begins to splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:07 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 11 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:13 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 24 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:19 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 38 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:25 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 48 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:31 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 70 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:37 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 73 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:43 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 88 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:49 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 103 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:56:55 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 119 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:01 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 136 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:07 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 145 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:13 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 155 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:19 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 167 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:25 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 178 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:31 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 207 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:37 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 219 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:43 2004] Foul Pusling has taken 198 damage from your Splurt.
[Sun Feb 15 22:57:43 2004] Your Splurt spell has worn off.

That's a total of 1979 damage in 17 ticks - efficiency is 8.35, or 9.39 with an Affliction Efficiency III/IV item - quite a bit more efficient than Funeral Pyre but also much slower.
▲ Page top
RE: Splurts Actual Damage
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2003 at 3:56 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
The last tick happens at random depending on when you cast it. Spells that last "4" ticks often get the 5th tick. This is because in literal terms the spell lasts 24 seconds. The world updates (the tick) every 6 seconds. This can result in 5 ticks of the spell, rather than just 4 ticks.

0123456789012345678901234
1-----2-----3-----4-----5

Edited, Tue Dec 16 03:59:52 2003
▲ Page top
splurt
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2003 at 10:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966048064
11 posts
This spell comes in handy in a few PoP zones when you're lvl 51-54 or so. No dd attached and it starts out slow, saving a lot of agro. Nothing I would keep memmed when fear kiting. It's just one of those, want to help out the group but don't feel like getting whooped on dots. If you are root rotting any non-fearable mobs, this is also a nice addition to spell lineup.

▲ Page top
A Necro staple throughout the 50's
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2003 at 9:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250729033
View User Forum
9 posts
Very mana efficient spell with fairly low resist rates. When you are low on mana but need some damage, this is the spell to call on. Tops out close to 1300 damage over the full 96 seconds. Because most of the damage is done at the end, it loses some appeal when fighting in groups that kill things faster than that. For that you'd want a fast, steady dot like Asystole or Cessation of Core.

Edited, Wed Jan 15 21:21:59 2003
▲ Page top
Special DoT
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2003 at 4:11 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771687598
Scholar
72 posts
This spell is an incremental DoT, meaning it does more damage every tick. I don't have any idea on what the actual numbers are, but here's the basics on how it works: Tick 1, 3 damage... Tick 2, 7 damage... Tick 3, 15 damage... and so on, doing massive damage the longer it lasts. Good for soloing and long group fights... any fight that will last for the duration of the spell (1min 36sec, maybe longer with Focus effects) or close to it.

Edited, Wed Jan 15 15:46:11 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Special DoT
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 7:02 PM Rating: Good
Morigu
Sage
239 posts
This should mean its low aggro at the start. While your moving up the mobs hate list, so are any melee's and they should have a lot more aggro by the time the higher damage at the end of the DoT is landing.

Voidslayer Jhereg, Destroyer of Worlds, Monk, <Celestial Navigators>, Drinal server
Vanidor Silverbranch, Wizard, <Celestial Navigators>, Drinal server
